creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  FreeBSD ports repository

                          patch-ac 
  Log:
  . Update to 2.0.
  . Modernise the port.
  
  PR:             157634
  Approved by:    Richard Stockley <rws@procopia.com> (MAINTAINER)
